scripts.checkdb: node -e "const db = require('./server/db/db'); db.query('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads').then(res => { console.log('Lead count:', res.rows[0].count); db.end(); }).catch(err => { console.error(err); db.end(); })"
scripts.checkdb:rows: node -e "const db = require('./server/db/db'); db.query('SELECT * FROM leads ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10').then(res => { console.log(res.rows); db.end(); }).catch(err => { console.error(err); db.end(); })"
scripts.checkdb:dups: node -e "const db = require('./server/db/db'); db.query('SELECT website, email, phone, COUNT(*) FROM leads GROUP BY website, email, phone HAVING COUNT(*) > 1').then(res => { console.log(res.rows); db.end(); }).catch(err => { console.error(err); db.end(); })"
